CustomField.description: Combined summary of all work item execution status across all work types (DML, Events, Flows, Emails, Notifications, Callouts).
CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(DmlSummary__c), "", "DMLs: " & DmlSummary__c & BR()) & IF(ISBLANK(EventSummary__c), "", "Events: " & EventSummary__c & BR()) & IF(ISBLANK(FlowSummary__c), "", "Flows: " & FlowSummary__c & BR()) & IF(ISBLANK(EmailSummary__c), "", "Emails: " & EmailSummary__c & BR()) & IF(ISBLANK(NotificationSummary__c), "", "Notifications: " & NotificationSummary__c & BR()) & IF(ISBLANK(CalloutSummary__c), "", "Callouts: " & CalloutSummary__c)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Combined summary of all work item execution status.
CustomField.label: Summary
